name: PokeRogue Offline
subtitle: Unofficial offline iOS client for PokéRogue
description: An unofficial offline wrapper for PokéRogue, built by Scooom. Play fully offline with local saves, or import your save from pokerogue.net.

apps.name: PokéRogue Offline
apps.subtitle: PokéRogue, fully offline.
apps.description:
An unofficial offline wrapper for PokéRogue. Play fully offline with local saves, or import your save from pokerogue.net.

Not affiliated with the PokéRogue team.
